name: Anxiety Loop — Worry Spiral
description: Anxious thinking creates a self-reinforcing loop: worry increases vigilance, which detects more threats, which increases worry. Avoidance provides short-term relief but maintains the cycle long-term.

context.socialSetting: will present to 30 people including senior leadership

beliefs: if I mess up everyone will judge me
my anxiety means something bad will happen
history: stuttered during a presentation 2 years ago

stimulus.description: Notices hands trembling slightly while reviewing notes. Thinks: 'Oh no, I'm already shaking, everyone will see.'

expected.behavior: considers canceling, spends time monitoring body sensations instead of reviewing content, may visit bathroom to avoid being seen shaking

sources: Clark & Beck 2010 — Cognitive Therapy of Anxiety Disorders
